hf.title: Xiaomi-Robotics-1: Scaling Vision-Language-Action Models with over 100K Hours of Real-World Trajectories
hf.abstract: We present Xiaomi-Robotics-1, a foundational vision-language-action (VLA) model capable of (1) following diverse language instructions to perform a wide range of mobile manipulation tasks in unseen environments out-of-the-box, and (2) efficiently adapting to novel downstream tasks with minimal fine-tuning data. We propose a two-stage training recipe consisting of pre-training and post-training. During pre-training, we imbue the model with broad and generalizable action-generation capabilities by training on over 100k hours of real-world manipulation trajectories collected via UMI devices. Cruc …
hf.titleZh: Xiaomi-Robotics-1：利用超10万小时真实世界轨迹扩展视觉-语言-动作模型
hf.summaryZh: 解决移动操作任务在未见环境的零样本泛化和快速适应问题。提出两阶段训练方案，预训练阶段在超10万小时真实世界操作轨迹上训练，赋予模型广泛的通用动作生成能力，后训练进一步适配下游任务。模型能直接遵循多样化语言指令，零样本完成未见环境中的移动操作，仅需少量微调即可高效适应新任务，在真实机器人场景中展现了强大泛化性。

hf.title: xHC: Expanded Hyper-Connections
hf.abstract: Hyper-Connections (HC) expand the residual stream of Transformers into N parallel streams, providing a form of memory scaling beyond model width and depth. Manifold-Constrained HC (mHC) stabilizes this formulation at scale. The large gains from N{=}1 to N{=}4 suggest residual-stream expansion as a promising scaling axis. However, existing HC-family methods typically stop at N{=}4. Our experiments reveal why: scaling mHC beyond this point yields diminishing performance gains and rapidly increasing training cost. We attribute this limitation to two bottlenecks: insufficient write-back informatio …
hf.summaryZh: 超连接将Transformer的残差流扩展为多个并行流，提供超越模型宽度和深度的记忆扩展能力，但从N=4继续扩展时性能增益递减、训练成本剧增。xHC通过引入写回信息增强和高阶动态衰减机制解决这一瓶颈，在N=16的设置下显著提升Transformer性能，验证了残差流扩展作为高效扩缩维度的潜力。

hf.title: RAGU: A Multi-Step GraphRAG Engine with a Compact Domain-Adapted LLM
hf.abstract: Graph retrieval-augmented generation (GraphRAG) enhances large language models with structured knowledge, yet existing systems construct knowledge graphs in a single extraction pass, producing noisy entities and brittle retrieval. RAGU, an open-source modular GraphRAG engine, addresses this by separating extraction from consolidation: entities and relations pass through two-stage typed extraction, DBSCAN-backed deduplication, LLM summarization, and Leiden community detection. A key insight motivates a compact extractor: the skills an in-pipeline LLM needs - comprehension, extraction, reasoning …
hf.titleZh: RAGU：采用紧凑领域自适应LLM的多步GraphRAG引擎
hf.summaryZh: 现有GraphRAG方法在单次抽取中构建知识图谱，常引入噪声实体并导致检索脆弱。RAGU将抽取与巩固分离，通过两阶段类型化抽取、基于DBSCAN的去重、LLM摘要和Leiden社区检测组成多步流水线。引擎使用紧凑的领域自适应LLM作为抽取器，仅需理解、抽取与推理等基础技能，有效降低计算开销。RAGU以开源模块化设计提升了知识图谱的质量与检索的鲁棒性，适用于各类需要结构化知识的应用场景。

hf.title: Loop the Loopies!
hf.abstract: We present Loopie, the most powerful looped Transformer to date. The Loopie series consists of two Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models: a 20B-parameter model with 2B active parameters and a 6Bparameter model with 0.6B active parameters. Looped Transformers have long faced a challenge: given an N-fold increase in pre-training compute, increasing the parameter count by a factor of N usually outperforms looping a model N times. Loopie addresses this challenge. Extensive ablation studies, including comparisons with a vanilla 30B-A3B model, show that Loopie substantially outperforms vanilla Transformer …
hf.summaryZh: 循环Transformer长期面临一个挑战：在预训练计算量增加N倍时，将参数量提升N倍通常优于让模型循环N次。Loopie系列采用混合专家架构（20B总参/2B活跃，6B总参/0.6B活跃），在同等算力下显著超越普通Transformer，如30B-A3B对比中表现更优。这项工作为构建高效大模型提供了新思路。

hf.title: Cura 1T: Specialized Model for Agentic Healthcare
hf.abstract: Healthcare spans high-stakes communication, expert reasoning, and workflow execution, yet specialized LLMs that cover these use cases together remain limited. A healthcare model must handle patient consultation, clinical reasoning over text and images, interactive diagnosis, and electronic health record (EHR) tool use. These capabilities fail in different ways, and a narrow update for one task can degrade another. We present Cura 1T, a healthcare-specialized LLM trained through a human-gated self-evolution loop. In each evolution round, a training agent plans a target capability, trains the mo …
hf.titleZh: Cura 1T：面向智能体医疗的专业化模型
hf.summaryZh: 医疗大语言模型需同时具备患者咨询、图文临床推理、交互诊断及电子健康记录工具调用等能力，但针对单一任务的更新往往损害其他能力。Cura 1T通过人类把关的自进化循环训练，每轮由训练代理规划目标能力并对模型进行微调，在不牺牲已有能力的前提下引入新技能。该方法实现了多任务医疗能力的协调优化，为构建覆盖沟通、推理与工作流执行的智能体医疗系统提供了基础。

hf.title: RESOURCE2SKILL: Distilling Executable Agent Skills from Human-Created Multimodal Resources
hf.abstract: Skills are a useful abstraction for software agents, turning human and agent experience into reusable procedural knowledge. Yet existing skill libraries are mostly hand-written, text-centric, or derived from agent traces, leaving tutorial videos and other multimodal human resources largely underused. We present RESOURCE2SKILL, a framework that distills multimodal resources, including tutorial videos, repositories, articles, and reference artifacts, into executable skills for software agents. RESOURCE2SKILL organizes these skills as a hierarchical multimodal Skill Wiki, where each entry combine …
hf.titleZh: RESOURCE2SKILL：从人类创建的多模态资源中蒸馏可执行智能体技能
hf.summaryZh: 现有技能库主要依靠手工编写或文本轨迹，未充分利用教程视频等多模态教学资源。RESOURCE2SKILL 框架从教程视频、代码仓库、文章等多模态资源中蒸馏出可执行技能，并构造为分层多模态技能维基，每个条目融合了实体的多模态信息。这样构建的技能库可直接被软件智能体调用，大幅提升了技能获取的自动化程度和资源覆盖范围。

hf.title: RecGPT-V3 Technical Report
hf.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are transforming recommender systems from matching co-occurrence patterns in historical behavior toward reasoning about the intent that drives it. RecGPT-V1 pioneered this paradigm on Taobao by centering user understanding, and RecGPT-V2 scaled it via coordinated multi-agent reasoning; both are deployed in production with consistent gains in user experience and commercial outcomes. However, operating RecGPT at scale reveals three challenges: (1) stateless behavior modeling, where each request reprocesses full user history, wasting computation and discarding prior a …
hf.summaryZh: 解决推荐大模型在工业级部署中因无状态行为建模导致的全历史重复处理、计算浪费与上下文丢失问题。RecGPT-V3 引入增量状态编码与记忆流机制，将用户行为压缩为可更新的隐状态，并配合多粒度推理调度平衡精度与效率。在淘宝生产环境中，相比 V2 降低近 30% 的推理计算量，同时保持点击率、转化率等核心指标不降。该架构为大规模实时推荐系统提供了更经济的持续感知与推理范式。

hf.title: On-Policy Delta Distillation
hf.abstract: On-policy distillation is an alternative post-training method in reinforcement learning that alleviates the constraints imposed by reward models by providing token-level supervision from a teacher model. Although on-policy distillation has been studied and applied across various settings, its fundamental design remains underexplored. In this paper, we introduce a new distillation reward, termed the delta signal, instead of directly imitating the teacher's output distribution. The delta signal is defined as the difference between the teacher model and its base model prior to instruction tuning …
hf.summaryZh: 在强化学习后训练中，on-policy 蒸馏通过提供 token 级监督缓解了奖励模型的限制，但其设计原理尚未被充分探索。该方法提出 delta 信号作为新的蒸馏奖励，即教师模型与其基础模型在指令微调前的输出差异，以此替代直接模仿教师分布。该信号旨在更精细地传递知识，有望提升策略优化的稳定性和效率，适用于大语言模型对齐等场景。

hf.title: From Human-Centric to Agentic Code Review: The Impact of Different Generations of Generative AI Technology on Review Quality
hf.abstract: Code review helps maintain software quality before code integration, but it also imposes a substantial workload on human reviewers. As generative artificial intelligence becomes part of software development, code review is shifting from a primarily human review process toward AI-supported review processes in which large language model (LLM) reviewers and AI agent reviewers participate alongside human reviewers. However, we still lack empirical evidence on how this transition affects review efficiency and review quality. In this paper, we study 1.02 million reviewed pull requests from 207 GitHu …
hf.titleZh: 从以人为中心到智能体代码审查：不同世代生成式AI技术对审查质量的影响
hf.summaryZh: 通过分析207个GitHub仓库的102万份代码审查请求，对比了纯人工、LLM辅助及AI智能体参与三种审查模式。结果显示，AI智能体在减少人工工作量方面效果显著，但复杂逻辑审查质量仍不及人类；纯LLM审查速度最快但缺陷检出率较低。该研究为团队选择AI辅助审查策略提供了实证依据。

hf.title: Understanding Reasoning from Pretraining to Post-Training
hf.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become central to improving large language models (LLMs) on complex reasoning tasks, yet RL post-training is largely studied in isolation from the pretraining that precedes it. As a result, two basic questions remain open: (1) how do pretraining choices (model size, data) shape the returns to RL compute, and (2) what does RL actually do to the model? These questions are difficult to study in the standard LLM setting: pretraining corpora are vast and uncontrolled, making it hard to attribute behaviors to pretraining versus RL, and systematic compute sweeps across …
hf.titleZh: 理解从预训练到后训练的推理能力
hf.summaryZh: 大模型后训练阶段的强化学习常被独立研究，其与预训练的关联尚不清晰。该工作聚焦两个核心问题：预训练模型的规模与数据选择如何影响后续RL的计算回报，以及RL究竟对模型产生了何种改变。为规避标准LLM设置中预训练语料不可控的干扰，研究构建了受控的预训练-后训练实验框架，系统扫描不同模型容量与数据条件下的RL收益，并剖析模型行为。实验表明，RL能够显著提升特定推理任务性能，其效果高度依赖于预训练基础。该研究为理解预训练到后训练的推理能力演进提供了基准分析。

hf.title: Qwen-Music Technical Report
hf.abstract: In this report, we introduce Qwen-Music, a powerful music generation model capable of producing highly musical and high-fidelity songs with complete vocal singing. Qwen-Music supports two core tasks: Text to Music Generation, which create entirely new songs from text descriptions, lyrics, and musical attributes, and Cover Song Generation, which reinterprets existing songs with different styles and vocal characteristics. Architecturally, Qwen-Music integrates three core components: Qwen-Music-Tokenizer, Qwen-Music-LLM, and Qwen-Music-Render. Qwen-Music-Tokenizer compresses audio into a 25 Hz si …
hf.summaryZh: Qwen-Music 是一套音乐生成模型，支持从文本描述、歌词和音乐属性生成全新歌曲，以及以不同风格和声线重新演绎现有歌曲。其架构整合了 Qwen-Music-Tokenizer、Qwen-Music-LLM 与 Qwen-Music-Render 三个组件，将音频压缩为 25Hz 的离散序列以进行高效建模。模型能够产出高音乐性、高保真、带完整演唱的歌曲，为自动作曲和翻唱任务提供了统一的生成方案。

hf.title: When Does Muon Help Agentic Reinforcement Learning?
hf.abstract: Muon is competitive with AdamW in large-scale pre-training, but its value for reinforcement-learning (RL) post-training remains unclear. We study vanilla Muon in sparse-reward agentic RL through matched single-seed comparisons with AdamW on ALFWorld using Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct. Under Group-in-Group Policy Optimization (GiGPO), applying Muon only to hidden weight matrices raises final-window validation success from 0.290 to 0.546 (+88%); high-rate AdamW controls retain no post-update success. The effect depends on the advantage estimator and learning rate. At 3e-5, Muon improves GRPO from 0.161 …
hf.titleZh: Muon何时有助于智能体强化学习？
hf.summaryZh: Muon在大规模预训练中与AdamW匹敌，但在强化学习后训练中的价值尚不明确。通过在ALFWorld稀疏奖励智能体任务上对Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct模型进行GiGPO框架下的对比实验，发现仅将Muon应用于隐藏层权重矩阵即可使最终窗口验证成功率从0.290提升至0.546（+88%），而高学习率AdamW无此效果。该效果依赖于优势估计器和学习率；例如在3e-5学习率下，Muon可提升GRPO的性能。为优化器在智能体RL微调中的选择提供指导，适用于稀疏奖励场景。

hf.title: Recursive Harness Self-Improvement
hf.abstract: Under model--harness co-evolution, harnesses are not merely inference-time scaffolds but data-generating components whose execution traces can shape future foundation models. This motivates harness-in-the-loop learning: optimizing harnesses for both immediate agent performance and the quality of traces used for future model training. However, continually updating provider-built scaffolds is costly and labor-intensive. We therefore investigate whether optimizing user-constructed harnesses in a task-specific manner can improve execution-trace quality while remaining computationally lightweight a …
hf.summaryZh: 在模型-工具共演中，工具的执行痕迹直接影响未来基础模型训练，但更新提供商支架成本高昂。以任务特定方式优化用户构建的工具，通过递归自我改进机制提升执行痕迹质量，同时保持计算轻量。实验显示该方法在多个任务上有效提升了代理性能与痕迹质量，为工具在环学习的用户端优化提供了可行方案。

hf.title: Beyond Entropy: Correctness-Aware Advantage Shaping via Contrastive Policy Optimization
hf.abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) commonly uses entropy for advantage shaping. However, entropy cannot distinguish useful uncertainty from detrimental confusion, limiting its effectiveness as a correctness signal. We propose Contrastive Policy Optimization (CPO), which uses token-level contrastive disagreement between reference-guided and vanilla generation distributions for correctness-aware advantage shaping. Both theoretical and empirical results show that this disagreement reliably indicates token-level correctness. We further show that On-policy Distillation is a speci …
hf.titleZh: 超越熵：基于对比策略优化的正确性感知优势塑造
hf.summaryZh: 强化学习可验证奖励（RLVR）中常用熵进行优势塑造，但熵无法区分有益不确定性与有害混乱，限制了其作为正确性信号的效果。对比策略优化（CPO）利用参考引导与原始生成分布间的token级对比分歧，实现正确性感知的优势塑造。理论与实验均表明该分歧能可靠指示token级正确性，为RLVR提供更精细的优势信号。

hf.title: DSWorld: A Data Science World Model for Efficient Autonomous Agents
hf.abstract: Despite strong capabilities in data understanding and decision-making, autonomous data science agents still heavily rely on trial-and-error workflows that involve expensive computation. This bottleneck motivates models that can anticipate the effects of data science operations before real execution. In this paper, we introduce the concept of Data Science World Model, which model the data science execution environment by predicting environment state transitions conditioned on current workflow states and candidate operations. We further propose DSWorld, a practical framework that combines struct …
hf.titleZh: DSWorld: 面向高效自主代理的数据科学世界模型
hf.summaryZh: 为解决自主数据科学代理在试错工作流中计算开销过大的问题，引入数据科学世界模型概念，通过预测环境状态转移来评估候选操作的效果。DSWorld 框架结合结构化表征与世界模型，在实际执行前模拟操作影响，从而指导代理避免无效计算。该方法可显著降低不必要的执行成本，提升数据科学自动化的效率。

hf.title: Audio-Visual Flamingo: Open Audio-Visual Intelligence for Long and Complex Videos
hf.abstract: We present Audio-Visual Flamingo (AV-Flamingo), a fully open state-of-the-art audio-visual large language model (AV-LLM) for joint understanding and reasoning over audio, images, and long-form videos. Unlike prior AV-LLMs that primarily focus on short clips, AV-Flamingo is designed for understanding and reasoning over long and complex real-world (audio-visual) videos. To support this, we make three key contributions: (i) Audio-Visual-Skills, a large-scale collection of real-world videos with ~7M caption and question-answer training instances designed to emphasize temporal, compositional, and c …
hf.titleZh: Audio-Visual Flamingo：面向长视频与复杂视频的开放音视频智能
hf.summaryZh: 针对当前音视频大模型主要局限于短视频理解的问题，推出完全开源的音频-视觉大语言模型 AV-Flamingo。其依赖大规模真实视频数据集 Audio-Visual-Skills（约 700 万条字幕与问答训练数据），强化时序组合与复杂推理能力，从而在长视频和复杂音视频任务上取得领先性能。该模型适用于需要联合理解长视频中音频、图像和语言信息的场景。

hf.title: S1-Omni: A Unified Multimodal Reasoning Model for Scientific Understanding, Prediction, and Generation
hf.abstract: We present S1-Omni, a unified multimodal reasoning model for scientific understanding, prediction, and generation. AI for Science (AI4S) has advanced significantly through domain-specific models, tool-augmented LLMs, and scientific language models. However, model capabilities remain highly fragmented, limiting the joint modeling of heterogeneous data, scientific laws, and expert knowledge. S1-Omni addresses this gap by consolidating these capabilities into a single, coherent scientific reasoning model. The architecture of S1-Omni is built upon three core components: unified representation of s …
hf.titleZh: S1-Omni：面向科学理解、预测与生成的统一多模态推理模型
hf.summaryZh: 为解决AI4S领域模型能力碎片化、难以联合建模异构数据与科学知识的问题，S1-Omni提出一个统一的多模态推理模型，集成领域模型、工具增强LLM和科学语言模型。其架构基于统一表示等三个核心组件，实现跨模态、跨任务的一致科学推理。该模型在科学发现、预测和生成场景中展现出更全面的推理潜力。

hf.title: VideoRAE: Taming Video Foundation Models for Generative Modeling via Representation Autoencoders
hf.abstract: Video generative models commonly rely on latent spaces learned by 3D Variational Autoencoders (3D-VAEs). However, conventional 3D-VAEs are mainly optimized for pixel-level reconstruction, which can limit the semantic and spatio-temporal structure captured by their latents. Meanwhile, Video Foundation Models (VFMs) such as V-JEPA 2 and VideoMAEv2 show strong video understanding capabilities, yet whether their frozen representations can be transformed into compact, reconstruction-capable, and generation-friendly video latents remains largely unexplored. We answer this question with VideoRAE, a r …
hf.titleZh: VideoRAE：通过表示自编码器驯服视频基础模型进行生成建模
hf.summaryZh: 传统3D VAE学到的潜在空间缺乏语义和时空结构，而视频基础模型(VFM)的冻结表示难以直接用于生成。VideoRAE通过表示自编码器将VFM(如V-JEPA 2、VideoMAEv2)的表示转化为紧凑、可重建且生成友好的视频潜在空间，填补了这一空白。实验表明该方法能有效支持视频生成，为利用VFM构建生成模型开辟了新方向。
